name: OCG: PASEK: WIADOMOŚCI ROTACYJNE (Wiper)
html_template: BTBINFO
css_template: .widget-container { position: relative;   width: var(--v-width, 190px); height: 170px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background-color: #000000; gap: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transform: translateX(50px) translateY(20px) scale(0.9); opacity: 0; transition: all 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); z-index: 100; box-sizing: border-box; } .active .widget-container { transform: translateX(0) translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; } .clock-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #f0f0f0, #ffffff, #c0c0c0); background-size: 200% 200%; animation: liveGrad1 4s ease infinite; } #current-time { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif !important; font-size: 65px !important; font-weight: 400 !important; color: #000000 !important; letter-spacing: 0px; line-height: 1; } .info-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; background: #8b0000; } .info-text-wrapper { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif !important; color: #ffffff; display: flex; align-items: center; } .btb-part { font-size: 38px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0px; } .info-part { font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; margin- letter-spacing: 0px; } @keyframes liveGrad1 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
js_template: (() => { const root = {{DOM_CONTEXT}}; const clockEl = root.querySelector('#current-time'); if(!clockEl) return; function updateClock() { const now = new Date(); const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0'); const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0'); clockEl.textContent = hours + ':' + minutes; } updateClock(); const timerId = setInterval(() => { if (!document.contains(clockEl)) return clearInterval(timerId); updateClock(); }, 1000); })();
